title: 毎日杯の後に・行雲流水

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she raced, Yaeno Muteki became aware of the
stark contrast between her own running style and
Oguri Cap's relaxed gait.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She may have lost, but she says she's more
satisfied with her performance today than at her
debut race. Our next stop is the first race in the
Classic Triple Crown tour, the Satsuki Sho!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, her classmate and rival Mejiro Ardan
has to sit out the Satsuki Sho. It seems like her
legs are in poor condition.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While it's an unfortunate turn of events, it doesn't
change Yaeno Muteki's ambition. She declares
Sakura Chiyono O her rival and vows to defeat
her.
